# Swooper Logbook Web App - Development Guide

This project is a personal mobile-friendly web application for tracking skydiving jumps with Google Sheets integration.

## Project Overview
- **Tech Stack:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Vanilla)
- **Data Storage:** LocalStorage + Google Sheets API
- **Target:** Mobile-responsive web app
- **Deployment:** Static hosting (GitHub Pages, Netlify, etc.)

## Key Features
- Jump logging with auto-incrementing numbers
- Component-based equipment system (harnesses, canopies, linesets)
- Equipment rigs with archiving capability
- Component-level and rig-level statistics
- Location analytics and usage tracking
- Offline capability with sync
- Export functionality
- PWA support

## Development Guidelines
- Keep code simple and maintainable
- Prioritize mobile-first responsive design
- Ensure offline functionality
- Follow web standards and best practices
- Maintain clean and documented code

## File Structure
- `/index.html` - Main application
- `/css/style.css` - Responsive styling  
- `/js/app.js` - Core application logic
- `/js/sheets.js` - Google Sheets integration
- `/config/` - Configuration and guides
- `/manifest.json` - PWA configuration
- `/sw.js` - Service worker for offline support

## Completed Setup Tasks:
